releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
This release fixes a bunch of issues caused by the change in how Templater commands were being processed. It should solve many many many problems with creating a new note from a template.


## What's Changed
* bugfix: default name for button by @shabegom in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/206
* Revert templater by @shabegom in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/211


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/compare/0.5.0...0.5.1
releases.name: Buttons 0.5.1 - Templater Fixes

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
Holy shit, look at all these awesome people that helped improve Buttons!

This release is going to break stuff. 🤷 

Enhancement: Moved to more reliable templater processor
Bugfix: buttons now render in Live Preview mode when Obsidian starts ([Lx](https://github.com/Lx))
Bugfix: improve reliability of templater option ([Lx](https://github.com/Lx))
Enhancement: improve speed of remove option ([Lx](https://github.com/Lx))
Feature: Add default folder and prompt for name settings ([unxok](https://github.com/unxok))
Features: Button type copy for "copy text to clipboard", and custom color for button background and tex ([rafa-carmo](https://github.com/rafa-carmo))
Feature: adds hidden attribute to buttons ([Liimurr](https://github.com/Liimurr))
Enhancement: Create folder for new note if it doesn't exist ([SabriDW](https://github.com/SabriDW))
Bugfix: fix template search with folders having "/" prefixed ([Balake](https://github.com/Balake))
Feature: Open new tab when creating new file ([0snug0](https://github.com/0snug0))
Update Readme: new note from template ([antulik](https://github.com/antulik))

## What's Changed
* #101 #67 fixed by @cumany in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/105
* Bug fix: improve `templater` option reliability by @Lx in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/117
* Faster `remove` by @Lx in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/118
* Change the template insertion method. by @Navirl in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/162
* Update Readme: new note from template by @antulik in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/163
* Add Prepend and Append logic to Command buttons by @pangolinsec in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/169
* New Feature: Open new tab when creating new file by @0snug0 in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/176
* Fixed remove in the modal (#97) by @RazMag in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/182
* fix template search with folders having "/" prefixed by @Balake in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/197
* Create folder for new note if it doesn't exist by @SabriDW in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/199
* adds hidden attribute to buttons, and copy type button by @Liimurr in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/200
* New features: Button type copy for "copy text to clipboard", and custom color for button background and text by @rafa-carmo in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/202
* Add default folder and prompt for name settings by @unxok in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/204
* Post pr merge fixes by @shabegom in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/205

## New Contributors
* @cumany made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/105
* @Navirl made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/162
* @antulik made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/163
* @pangolinsec made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/169
* @0snug0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/176
* @RazMag made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/182
* @Balake made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/197
* @SabriDW made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/199
* @Liimurr made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/200
* @rafa-carmo made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/202
* @unxok made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/204

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/compare/0.4.19...0.5.0
releases.name: It's aliiiive

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Inline button: fix on mobile by @OuchPotato in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/141

## New Contributors
* @OuchPotato made their first contribution in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/141

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/compare/0.4.18...0.4.19
releases.name: Bugfix: fix inline button positioning on mobile

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
This release fixes a bug introduced with Obsidian 1.0 where button colours weren't working
It also adds a note about the upcoming Buttons 1.0 release

## What's Changed
* Fix button color by @shabegom in https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/pull/139


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shabegom/buttons/compare/0.4.17...0.4.18
releases.name: Bugfix: Button Colors

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: Fix by @Lx to have buttons in live preview render properly when obsidian loads.
releases.name: Bugfix: Buttons render on obsidian load

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Templater changed the templates folder setting, so Templater templates were broken. Should be fixed.
- Some folks were having issues with `calculate` buttons. I believe it could be a whitespace issue, so I'm trimming whitespace now...
releases.name: Bugfix: Templater and trimming whitespace

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
In 0.4.13 I introduced a bugfix to render inline buttons on initial load. It kind of worked

In 0.4.14 I thought I made it better, but it stopped working altogether.

In this release, I think I have totally nailed it!!!
releases.name: Bugfix: Inline Buttons Render on Initial Load

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
The previous fix in 0.4.13 is working beautifully for the desktop app. It is so nice! But it isn't working at all on mobile. So this update is to handle the mobile app.

Sidenote: testing the mobile app is hard! I didn't catch the bug until after the last release, and now I'm hoping this will fix it... 😨 

Oh..this also adds the ability for you to use HTML in a button's name. pretty cool. 😉
releases.name: Bugfix: Inline Buttons Render on Initial Load of Mobile App

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: in 0.4.12 I fixed a bug where inline buttons weren't rendering on first load of a vault. The fix was pretty janky, so I went back and made it safer and more likely to work. I also learned how to create and emit my own Events, which will come in handy for future development!
releases.name: Safer initial Inline Button rendering

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Fixes Issues #57 where a button with `remove` wasn't being removed due to Templater processing in the file.
- Fixes Issues #64 and #62 where inline buttons wouldn't render on loading the vault.
releases.name: Bugfixes

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: This should fix issues #53 and #54
releases.name: Bugfix: Don't throw error if Templater isn't installed

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: Another bugfix for the Templater folder not being found! Yikes! Who wrote this plugin?!
releases.name: Bugfix: Templater Folder

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: This release exposes the ability to create a button programmatically. This is for using Buttons inside a dataviewjs codeblock.
releases.name: Expose createButton function

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Bugfix: If you kept your Core Plugin Templates and Templater templates in different folders, Buttons would only find the ones in Templater folder. This is now fixed.
- Bugfix: If you had multiple buttons in a note that used `templater true` it could use the args from the wrong button. This is now fixed.
releases.name: Bugifixes: Multiple Buttons & Template Folders

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
[![buttons!](https://cleanshot-cloud-fra.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/media/9644/MQsFseArhutx21x7huVgZbFgQWz8FoR5cxInLX9k.jpeg?X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEPr%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaDGV1LWNlbnRyYWwtMSJHMEUCIQCgm0gSlZaDfuCYZDgT5SUJmJBbaXOyROTOvpvsktMoxAIgEiALpXwEBHiK1hV0%2FV7EulWSHT5IDKyYmXmOrticRboq4gEIk%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FARAAGgw5MTk1MTQ0OTE2NzQiDO%2Bn2L5%2BbGzcD5Rg2Sq2AXlhhnPgoZvbRkY0JSRw%2FUYIpnko6kFYQskii1nVuuENeqj4vzMTxDe%2BFjowhCmb%2BHTviuaxVrxdGEUbTtKYhgsDLDvjGvqpOgmVy1hbvvqTxZO4I4FQ6vMvB9beLfYW%2FegkINdGhq7IhYtU5cd1XibyYQlJDwW5jog5JBXV9IqwKI%2BV3o1KfvJwf8R4u7gJYzZEl7J4vf%2FhL5rs02O6zAKOuY8EEGc6J9T4fhA0w3U83xkmDIJ%2FMN2%2FmoUGOuABWvqwsChvb3hfpgoExUFfHm6GBa9j6nUNrrEY2GdC%2FHcUz6%2Br7CCBBc6ysKW1Z1lA%2B%2FxTA%2BCwqB2JzpbJUTRkhCCDOxt7Ea3hWLZsHQFA8R2xHhhZ2%2BtL8YhrVCXbm311CUgCJbJXNPNoceZ83BdPh%2BbnmmkxOU8X371nR01GRpdyBcutXxjwHjWLw5syeLBo6tBdLWLXy2TNY2gQsFnNuc%2B7l2AgpaG%2FUYfyjw3VHuOapoJrOe8qbAyadWSv2kmq%2BW80yEPxFnTJs9yF2Ykg%2BUakedIQC3NzrslZNNgJp9s%3D&X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Credential=ASIA5MF2VVMNJ24UO2S2%2F20210520%2Feu-central-1%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20210520T194153Z&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&X-Amz-Expires=300&X-Amz-Signature=7fcbd95895ee7a97c663fec4aee8635c790c49d6af07c0f6542ef1f2349bdf4b)](https://youtu.be/W17CCQpGZdQ)  
[Watch the Release Video](https://youtu.be/W17CCQpGZdQ)

- Added a new Button Type: Text Button. It works similar to a Template Button but you can add any arbritrary text. Works great with the templater arg
- Button Maker Changes: Moved the type of Text/Template Button to it's own dropdown
- Bugfixes: Fixed some bugs to make the templater arg even more stable!
releases.name: New Text Button Type!

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Fix for Issue #40 where the Button Maker wouldn't load if a Templates folder hadn't been specified
- Fix for Issues #38 where the templater command wouldn't revent after clicking the button
releases.name: Bugfixes

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
Templater arg had a bug that was causing a deletion in the file the button was in. This update should fix that nasty bug. It also makes `templater true` safer to use overall. You can now do stuff like:

\`\`\`button
name Templater!
type line(<% tp.file.content.split("\n").length %>) template
action Current Time
templater true
\`\`\`
releases.name: Bugfix for templater args

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Bugfix: reduced the height of the Button Maker for smaller displays
- Bugfix: blue and purple buttons colors in the Button Maker should now work properly
releases.name: Bugfixes for Button Maker

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
You can now create a Line Template Button to insert a template into the current note at the line specified:

\`\`\`button
name Add to Bottom
type line(50) template
action End of Note Template
\`\`\`

Pairs great with the `replace` argument as well! Enjoy!
releases.name: New Feature: Line Template Button

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: It turns out that not everyone is making Buttons on a giant 4k display. This update makes the Button Maker scrollable and fixes a few bugs as well. The ability to add a custom button-block-id in the maker is also added.
releases.name: Scrollable Button Maker

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
This is a quick fix to 0.4.0 to bring back mobile compatibility 🙈 

---

[Watch the release video on Youtube](https://youtu.be/2qltHuOjD54)  
[![0.4.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shabegom/buttons/0.4.0/img/040.png)](https://youtu.be/2qltHuOjD54)
- Inline Buttons! You can add buttons inline using the button block-id (^button-id) using this syntax \`button-id\`
- Insert Inline Button: Use **Insert Inline Button** from the command palette to quickly insert a new inline button
- Button Maker: Open the Button Maker from the command palette to quickly and easily create a new button
- New Button Arg - `swap`: use the `swap [id1, id2, id3]` arg along with an inline button to create a button that performs multiple actions on each click
- New Button Arg - `templater`: the templater arg allows you to put a templater command inside a button. When the button is clicked the templater command is converted to it's value and then is converted back to the templater command: `note(<% tp.date.now("MM-DD") %>) template`
releases.name: Inline Buttons! Button Maker! More!!!

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
[Watch the release video on Youtube](https://youtu.be/2qltHuOjD54)  
[![0.4.0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shabegom/buttons/0.4.0/img/040.png)](https://youtu.be/2qltHuOjD54)
- Inline Buttons! You can add buttons inline using the button block-id (^button-id) using this syntax \`button-id\`
- Insert Inline Button: Use **Insert Inline Button** from the command palette to quickly insert a new inline button
- Button Maker: Open the Button Maker from the command palette to quickly and easily create a new button
- New Button Arg - `swap`: use the `swap [id1, id2, id3]` arg along with an inline button to create a button that performs multiple actions on each click
- New Button Arg - `templater`: the templater arg allows you to put a templater command inside a button. When the button is clicked the templater command is converted to it's value and then is converted back to the templater command: `note(<% tp.date.now("MM-DD") %>) template`
releases.name: Inline Buttons! Button Maker! More!!!

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- fixes type errors in removing duplicates
- checks and updated button store more often
- clean up remove + prepend issues
releases.name: Bugfix: Better remove button handling

releases.author: shabegom
releases.name: Bugfix - the case of the dissapearing buttons

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: Last bugfix for mobile. Avoiding localstorage
releases.name: Bugfix - don't use localstorage on mobile

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: For some reason, the button block-id wasn't working on mobile. This will hopefully fix that.
releases.name: Bugfix - more mobile fixing

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: I broke moible in 0.3.2. This should fix it.
releases.name: Bugfix - Make Mobile Work

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: This fixes a bug where prepending with replace was putting the prepended template in the wrong location.
releases.name: Bugfix - Prepend with Replace

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: So I screwed up the 0.3.0 update for anyone who wasn't on the insiders build of Obsidian. I used a method that isn't released yet. This bugfix should fix that, and an additional type error. Sorry for the problem! Hopefully, insiders will be released soon and I can pull out the workaround.
releases.name: Bugfix - Bring Back My Buttons

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- You can add a block-id below a button block. The button block-id can be used to inherit arguments from a button or to remove multiple buttons
- remove can now be an array of button block-ids to remove (it can still be true to remove the clicked button)
- replace now takes an array like [startLine,endLine] to define the start and end line to be replaced.
- append, prepend, remove, replace have been updated to use the button position. name is no longer required.

0.3.1 fixes some wee bugs in 0.3.0
releases.name: Button Block IDs! Remove Multiple Buttons! Replace Improved!

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- You can add a block-id below a button block. The button block-id can be used to inherit arguments from a button or to remove multiple buttons
- remove can now be an array of button block-ids to remove (it can still be true to remove the clicked button)
- replace now takes an array like [startLine,endLine] to define the start and end line to be replaced.
- append, prepend, remove, replace have been updated to use the button position. name is no longer required.
releases.name: Button Block IDs! Remove Multiple Buttons! Replace Improved!

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
When using a Template Button to create a note:

```
type note(My New Note, split)
```

You can now use `-` and `!` and other characters in the note title:

```
type note(My Awesome-Note!, split)
```
releases.name: Support ! and - and more in newly created note name

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
When creating a new note using a Template button, you can now open the new note in a split:

```
type note(Note Name, split) template
action My Template
```
releases.name: Split Newly Created Note with note(Note Name, split) template

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: - You can now disable the core Templates plugin and use Templater. Define your Templates folder in Templater and template actions should work.
releases.name: Allow Templater without core Templates plugin

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: - Broke template action with last update. This fixes it. 😥
releases.name: Quickfix

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- reverting a change that made link actions break if there was capitalization among other issues with converting values to lower case.
- added a bit of padding around the button div so that two buttons next to each other doesn't look gross.
releases.name: Bugfix for lower case urls etc

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: -  fixed a bug that was preventing proper template insertion
releases.name: Bugfix

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Add a command palette command to add a button codeblock to a note
- Set default button styles with Style Settings plugin
releases.name: Styles & Insert Button Command

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
# New Button Type: Calculate
- A `calculate` button can perform a math equation! As specified in the button itself, or by referencing lines in a note that have numbers.
- Many different math symbols are supported!
- check the README for examples

## Bug Fixes
- the append action added a bunch of extra whitespace. This should be fixed!
releases.name: Calculate Button Type

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: Forgot to pull logging out in the last release 🙈
releases.name: Remove logging

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: Button styling update! The default button should look a bit nicer. You can still override defaults with your own class.

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Removed the shine hover effect because it looks crummy on mobile.
- added a `replace` argument. Use along with `type prepend template` to replace existing content between a specified header and the button:

\`\`\`button
name My Replace Button
type prepend template
action A Template. 
replace ## Section Heading   
\`\`\`

- added a _note() template_ option to the `type` argument that will create a new note based on the specified template:

\`\`\`button
name My Template Button
type note(Path/Note Name) template
action My Template
\`\`\`

Check the README for requirements and more information.
releases.name: Add replace and note()

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
- Addresses code review from https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/221#issuecomment-808885317
- Added helpful notices in case
releases.name: Address Code Review & Add Notices

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
Add the `template` button type
- prepend or append content from a specified template
releases.name: Add template functionality

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: - added a `remove` argument. adding `remove` to the button will remove the button after it executes the command or opens the link.
releases.name: Add remove feature

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description:
**This release includes a breaking change from the previous release**

`customClass` argument is now `class`
`customId` argument is now `id`

Adding a `class` argument will remove default button styling. You can add that styling back by including the class names as values to the `class` argument:

`class button-default button-shine`

This change allows you to combine different classes to create many different button style. Enjoy!
releases.name: Updated Styling

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: - added an argument to supply a custom css ID for styling purposes
releases.name: Add customId argument

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: - added a `customClass` argument for custom button styling
releases.name: Add customClass argument

releases.author: shabegom
releases.description: The first release of the Obsidian Buttons plugin!
releases.name: Initial Release
